field_group.brief: Key dates and timestamps for a trade.
field_group.description:
One of five field-groups that compose trading::domain::trade via
rfl::Flatten<T>.  See trade_identity_field_group.json for the
rationale behind the sub-struct decomposition.

This group carries the temporal dimension fields (trade date,
effective date, termination date, and execution timestamp).
All are optional because not every trade type requires all dates
at creation time.

fields.name: trade_date
fields.description: Date on which the trade was agreed (ISO-8601 date string).

fields.name: effective_date
fields.description: Date from which the trade becomes effective (ISO-8601 date string).

fields.name: termination_date
fields.description: Scheduled end date of the trade (ISO-8601 date string).

fields.name: execution_timestamp
fields.description: Exact moment the trade was executed (ISO-8601 timestamp string).
